name: pm-plugin
description: PM delegate workflows for AI-native discovery, research, planning, backlog grooming, TASK_SPEC creation, and Claude handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Run discovery-first, research-backed PM workshops and create Claude-ready handoffs with Codex.
interface.longDescription: PM provides Codex PM delegate workflows for discovery-first, research-backed brainstorm workshops, roadmap ranking, backlog grooming, PM sync checks, TASK_SPEC creation, and Claude-ready handoffs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run a discovery-first, research-backed PM workshop, confirm the workflow with the human, then produce scoped documents, TASK_SPEC candidates, and Claude handoff material.
